atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Use the `@tailwind` directive to insert Tailwind's `base`, `components`, `utilities` and `screens` styles into your CSS.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Use the `@apply` directive to inline any existing utility classes into your own custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Use the `@theme` directive to define your project's design tokens.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Use the `@source` directive to explicitly specify source files that Tailwind should scan for class names.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Use the `@utility` directive to define custom utility classes.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Use the `@variant` directive to apply a Tailwind variant to styles.

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: Use the `@custom-variant` directive to create a custom variant.

atDirectives.name: @plugin
atDirectives.description: Use the `@plugin` directive to include a Tailwind CSS plugin.
